title: Project Manager - Technical
description:
Job Description

•  Need to Lead a team of 20+ engineers in the design, development, and deployment of advanced electrical, electronic, and integrated security and fire alarm systems.

•  Manage the full project lifecycle for multimillion-dollar contracts, ensuring strict adherence to budget, timeline, and quality benchmarks.

•  Direct the installation, integration, and commissioning of Fire Alarm and Detection systems, ensuring full compliance with Singapore SCDF regulations and standards.

•  Spearhead design improvements enhanced system reliability and reduced product failure rates by over 60%.

•   Provide technical mentorship and professional development guidance to junior engineers and technicians.

•  Coordinate with R&D, manufacturing, and marketing teams to ensure project alignment with overarching business objectives.

•  Manage the installation and commissioning of complex electrical, security, and low-current systems for high-profile clients in healthcare, transportation, and government sectors.

•  Direct the execution of large-scale projects, including CCTV, ANPR, Card Access, AGV, and Pneumatic Tube Systems (PTS).

•  Developed technical proposals, statements of work, and integration plans, providing key support for business development and client acquisition.

•  Ensure 100% on-time project delivery while maintaining full compliance with all safety regulations and quality standards.

•  Specialize in programming, troubleshooting, and maintenance of CCTV, Intercom, Card Access, and Auto Gate systems.

postedCompany.description:
Hitech Images was established in April 2009 providing services in the inkjet printing industries. Providing Services in the Large format printing and Technology Company - Specializes in the production of Large Prints and images, posters, banners,Vehicle Stickers, Signages, LED Signages, Acrylic Cut-out Letters, Acrylic Light Box, T-Shirt Printing, Books Magazine, Website Design & Hosting, Web Development, Advertisement Flim, Creative Logo Design with a range of experience in signages manufacturing.


Over years, today it is known as Hi-Tech Images Pte. Ltd. with a past proven records of producing products ranging from indoor to outdoor services. Using the latest, state of the Art Technology in Digital Printing and most current softwares, we are able to produce & deliver on-time delivery with high quality image anticipating your needs & exceeds your requirements.


Our business set-up concept is to provide consultations & professionalism services in terms of planning using high quality digital printing technology to suit your requirements. Our professional services had extended to the following industries :-

  • Advertising Agencies
  • Design & Communications House
  • Marketing Consultants
  • Exhibition Companies
  • Property Developers
  • Government & Statuatories Boards
  • Commercial Companies
  • Retail Outlets
  • MRT & LRT Trains
  • Vans, Trucks & Buses
postedCompany.name: HI-TECH IMAGES PTE. LTD.
